_comment: Printed-arithmetic computed fields consumed by maine_forms_engine.computations. formula_text is the instruction printed verbatim on the blank (tests/test_computations.py re-checks this against the fetched PDF; the printed fill-in blanks are collapsed to single spaces). Recipe-tier wiring: this form's mapping.json is pointer-only (empty map), so the mapped computations routing never sees it — instead engine/fill_and_audit.fill_one calls the engine's facts-only entry point (compute_facts) and merges an omitted target into the case BEFORE the recipe (engine/recipes/infer_mj_debtor_disclosure.py) runs; the recipe places facts.mj_total into the 'for a total of' widget. Warnings-only: a supplied total is always written as-is, a contradiction adds a COMPUTATION_MISMATCH entry.

facts.mj_total.formula_text: The judgment debtor currently owes the judgment creditor $ plus interest of $ plus costs of $ , for a total of $ .
